extra_slides.purpose: 첫 2초 안에 시청자를 멈추게 하는 충격적 메시지
extra_slides.prompt:
Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. White background #FFFFFF. VERY GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Center: bold typography in navy #1A1F36, Pretendard ExtraBold 72pt: '면봉으로 귀 파면
안 됩니다'. Below in coral #FF6B6B, Pretendard SemiBold 48pt: '매일 12,000명이
응급실 간다고요?'. Bottom small teal #20B2AA label: 소아과언니. No icons, no decorations. Clean infographic style.

extra_slides.purpose: 면봉 사용의 위험성을 실사로 보여주는 클로즈업
extra_slides.prompt: Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Close-up photo: adult hand holding white cotton swab near child's ear (side profile, no face visible). Soft natural lighting. White background #FFFFFF. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right small overlay text: 소아과언니 navy #1A1F36. Top-left small coral #FF6B6B rounded label: 위험. Photorealistic style, clean composition. Korean baby, East Asian facial features, chubby cheeks; Korean mother/father, East Asian appearance, Korean parent

extra_slides.prompt: Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Close-up photo: child's hand holding cotton swab horizontally at eye level, motion blur suggesting sudden movement. Soft white background #FFFFFF. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right small overlay text: 소아과언니 navy #1A1F36. Top-left small coral #FF6B6B rounded label: 77%가 아이 스스로. Photorealistic style, clean composition, no face visible.
